tests.command: cd {crate_path} && RUST_BACKTRACE=1 MIRIFLAGS='-Zmiri-disable-isolation -Zmiri-backtrace=full' cargo +nightly miri test --features backend-mmap,backend-bitmap
cd {crate_path} && RUSTFLAGS="-D warnings" cargo check --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu --no-default-features --features backend-bitmap,backend-mmap,backend-atomic,iommu
